ety: inf. n. x of دوم 'to continue or last'
def: s.f. Seeking or desiring permanence; wishing to be quiet, steady, &c.; acting with deliberation; assiduity.
more: (inf. x. of دوام) s. f. Seeking to be permanent, quiet, steady, everlasting; assiduity.

ety: inf. n. x of دين 'to borrow'
def: s.f. Contracting a debt, borrowing; demanding payment of a debt, suing for a debt; limited liability (of a partner in business).

ety: inf. n. x of دلّ 'to direct aright'
def: s.m. Seeking proof, arguments or reasons; proof, demonstration, argument ( = دليل dalīl, q.v.).
more: (inf. x. of دلالت) s. m. Seeking proof, arguments or reasons; demonstration, argument.
wety: Ultimately from Arabic اِسْتِدْلَال (istidlāl).

ety: inf. n. x of درج 'to go step by step'
def: s.m. Withdrawing or advancing gradually; seeking to remove by degrees.

ety: inf. n. x of درك 'to reach'
def: s.m. Reaching, overtaking, obtaining; comprehending, understanding; (in Gram.) emendation; contrariety, antithesis (e.g. ḥarf-i-istidrāk, particle of emendation, adversative particle).
more: (inf. x. of درک Heb. He travelled, overtook) s. m. Reaching, overtaking, obtaining; comprehending, understanding.

ety: inf. n. x of وفی 'to be full,' &c.
def: s.m. Satisfying completely; paying or receiving in full of all demands; renouncing, relinquishing, resigning (an appointment, see istěʻfā).
more: (inf. x. of وفا) s. m. 1. Satisfying completely, paying or receiving the whole of what is due. 2. Renouncing, relinquishing.

ety: inf. n. x of فيد; iv افاد 'to derive advantage'
def: s.m. Seeking gain or advantage (fāʼida); attainment; profit, gain, advantage ( = fāʼida).
more: (inf. x. of فایده) s. m. 1. Seeking gain. 2. Profit, advantage, attainment.

ety: inf. n. x of فہم 'to understand'
def: s.m. Desiring or seeking information, asking for an explanation; inquiry, interrogation.
more: (inf. x. of فہم) s. m. Desiring or seeking information; inquiry, interrogation. حرف استفہام ḥarf-i-istifhām, An interrogative pronoun.
wety: From Arabic اِسْتِفْهَام (istifhām).

def: adj. Interrogatory; interrogative (particle or pronoun).
adj. Interrogatory. istifhā'mī , n. f. (In Gram .) An interrogative.
adj. Interrogative.

ety: inf. n. x of فرغ 'to pour forth,' &c.
def: s.m. Vomiting; rejecting; belching.
more: (inf. x. of فراغت) s. m. Vomiting.

ety: inf. n. x of فسر 'to declare, explain,' &c.
def: s.m. Seeking information (of); inquiry, question, interrogation; investigation, search; reference
more: (inf. x. of فسر Heb. He explained) s. m. Searching for information, asking an explanation, inquiry, interrogation. استفسار کرنا istifsār karnā, v. a. To inquire, interrogate, demand an explanation, ask.
subs: (-se), To inquire (of), require an explanation (from); to question, interrogate; to call for information; to make a reference (to).
wety: From Arabic اِسْتِفْسَار (istifsār).

def: s.f. Statement of a prosecutor subject to investigation.

ety: inf. n. x of فتو
def: s.m. Taking a legal opinion (fatwa), consulting a lawyer or doctor of law.
more: (inf. x. of فتويٰ) s. m. Consulting (a lawyer or learned man).

ety: inf. n. x of غوث 'to cry for help'
def: s.m. Asking for help; demanding justice; moving (a court) for justice; complaining; complaint; suit
more: (inf. x. of غوث) s. m. Asking for help; demanding justice, complaining.
subs: To demand justice; to seek redress; to sue.

ety: inf. n. x of غفر 'to pardon'
def: s.m. Asking pardon, begging mercy; craving grace; deprecating; deprecation; the (Mohamadan's) prayer for defence against the evil spirit (Shait̤ān); mercy; deliverance
more: (inf. x. of غفران) s. m. Begging mercy, craving grace, deprecating. استغفار کرنا istig̠ẖfār karnā, To crave mercy, to deprecate.
subs: To seek pardon or forgiveness of God; to crave mercy; to deprecate.

ety: inf. x of غني 'to be able to dispense with'
def: s.m. Ability to dispense with, independence (in point of fortune), opulence; content; — adj. Independent; contented.
more: (inf. x. of غنا) s. m. Content, independence (in point of fortune). ¶ adj. Independent, contented.

ety: inf. n. x of غرب 'to be obscure or unintelligible'
def: s.m. Great admiration; amazement, wonder.
more: (inf. x. of غروب) s.m. Great admiration, amazement, wonder.

ety: inf. n. x of غرق 'to be submerged, to sink'
def: s.m. Drowning; the being immersed, absorbed, or wholly engaged (in anything); immersion; lien; mortgage
more: (inf. x. of غرق) s.m. Drowning, the being immersed, absorbed, or wholly engaged (in any thing). ¶ adj. Drowned, immersed in thought, engrossed, wholly employed, drowned in sleep, &c.
wety: Borrowed from Arabic اِسْتِغْرَاق (istiḡrāq).

def: (inf. x. of حسن Heb. Was good) s. m. Approving, praising, taking or considering as a favour.

ety: inf. n. x of جوب 'to rend,' &c.
def: s.f. Answering, accepting; hearing or answering prayer, receiving a petition.
more: (inf. x. of جوب Heb. and Ch. ) s. f. Answering, hearing and accepting (prayer).

ety: inf. n. x of جوز 'to be allowable'
def: s.f. Asking leave, begging permission.

ety: inf. n. x of قوم 'to stand, rise up'
def: s.f. Keeping oneself upright, standing erect; standing still; rectitude, integrity; stability; durability; firmness, constancy.
more: (inf. x. of قیام) s. f. Standing erect; rectitude, integrity, continuance, stability, constancy, residence.
wety: Borrowed from Arabic اِسْتِقَامَة (istiqāma).

ety: inf. n. x of قبل 'to come forward'
def: s.m. Encountering, meeting; the ceremony of meeting and receiving a visitor; reception, welcome; futurity; (in Gram.) the future tense
more: (inf. x. of قبل Heb. and Ch. He came in front, he accepted) s. m. 1. Encountering, meeting, the ceremony of meeting and receiving a visitor. 2. Futurity.
subs: (-kā), To advance to meet (a person); to receive or welcome (a person); to go forth to meet and welcome (a guest).
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian استقبال (istiqbāl), from Arabic اِسْتِقْبَال (istiqbāl).

ety: inf. n. x of کبر 'to be great or large'
def: s.m. Pride, conceit, presumption.
more: (inf. x. of کبر Heb. ) s. m. Pride, presumption, conceit.

ety: Old P. istakhar, Zend śtakhra, 'firm,' rt. śtak = S. स्तक्
def: s.m. 'Standing firm'; the ancient Persepolis.

ety: inf. n. x of خير 'to be possessed of good'
def: s.m. Seeking to obtain the Divine favour; looking into the Qoʼrān, or the Bible, for a good augury or omen; judging from omens or augury; stichomancy; bibliomancy.
more: (inf. x. of خیر) s. m. Judging from omens, augury.

ety: inf. n. x of خدم 'to serve'
def: s.m. Employing, making use of the labour of another; seeking or getting employment.
more: (inf. x. of خدم) s. m. Employing, making use of the labour of another, asking or getting employment.

ety: inf. n. x of خفّ 'to be light'
def: s.m. Holding in slight esteem, making light of, despising; indignity.
more: (inf. x. of خفّف) s. m. Making light of, despising, holding in contempt; indignity.

ety: inf. n. x of خلص 'to be clear'
def: s.m. Seeking to liberate; liberation, release; liberty, freedom.
more: (inf. x. of خلص Heb. Was free, separated) s. m. Seeking to liberate; liberation, liberty, freedom.

ety: inf. n. x of خرج 'to go out or forth'
def: s.m. Causing to go or come out, expulsion, banishment; rejection; taking out, drawing forth, extraction.
more: (inf. x. of خروج) s. m. Making to go or come out, expulsion, drawing forth, extracting, extraction; banishment.

ety: inf. n. x of قلّ 'to lift, raise up'
def: s.m. Absolute power or authority, sovereignty, supremacy; independence; absoluteness; intrepidity; firmness, resolution, constancy; steadiness; perseverance, persistence.
more: (inf. x. of قلّت) s. m. Absolute power, absolute authority, sovereignty, independence, absoluteness, intrepidity, resolution, perseverance, vigour.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian اِسْتِقْلَال (istiqlāl), from Arabic اِسْتِقْلَال (istiqlāl).

def: adj. ( = mustaqil), Having absolute power; invested with authority; confirming in possession

ety: inf. n. x of کمل 'to be perfect'
def: s.m. Seeking the completion or perfection (of any thing); completion; bringing to perfection.
more: (inf. x. of کمال) s. m. 1. Seeking the completion or perfection (of any thing). 2. Completion, bringing to perfection.

ety: inf. n. x of قراً 'to read'
def: s.m. Reasoning from induction.
more: (inf. x. of قرء Heb. He read) s. m. Reasoning from induction.

ety: inf. n. x of کره 'to dislike'
def: s.m. Aversion, loathing, abhorrence; reluctance.
more: (inf. x. of کره) s. f. Aversion, reluctance.

ety: inf. n. x of قرّ 'to remain firm, rest, &c.'
def: s.m. Requiring or calling for settlement or affirmation; confirming, ratifying; confirmation, ratification; declaration; recognition.

ety: inf. n. x of کشف 'to open, make manifest'
def: s.m. Desiring or requesting the manifestation (of anything); exposition or laying open (of anything).
more: (inf. x. of کشف) s. m. Seeking the manifestation, exposition or laying open (of any thing).

ety: inf. n. x of ولي 'to be master of, control'
def: s.m. Predominance, conquest; domination, ascendency, authority.
more: (inf. x. ولي) s. m. Predominance, conquest.

ety: inf. n. viii of صلح 'to be good, suitable, agreeable,' &c.
def: s.f. Phrase, phraseology, idiom, usage; accepted signification, conventional meaning; conventional term, technical term.
more: (inf. viii. of صلح) s. f. A phrase, idiom, technical term, figure in rhetorick. (Pl. اصطلاحات).
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian اِصْطِلَاح (istilāh), from Arabic اِصْطِلَاح (iṣṭilāḥ).

def: s.f. pl. (of iṣt̤ilāḥ), Phrases, idioms; conventional terms, technicalities.
adj. Phraseological, idiomatic; conventional, technical
more: adj. Idiomatical, phraseological, technical. اصطلاحي معني iṣt̤ilāḥī maﻌnī, Idiomatical meaning or acceptance.
subs: s.f. The conventional or secondary meaning.

ety: inf. n. x of لزم 'to be necessary'
def: s.m. Rendering necessary; requiring; necessity.
more: (inf. x. of لزوم) s. m. 1. Rendering necessary. 2. Necessity.

ety: inf. n. viii of سمع 'to hear'
def: s.m. Hearing, listening (to music, particularly); — what is heard; tidings, report, rumour.
more: (inf. viii. of سمع) s. m. 1. Hearing, listening (to musick, &c. particularly). 2. Tidings, report, rumour, what is heard.

ety: inf. n. x of ميل 'to incline to
def: s.f. Caressing, conciliating; soothing, consoling; winning or gaining over; solace; encouragement.
more: (inf. x. of میل) s. f. Conciliating, consolation, encouragement.

ety: inf. n. x of نبط 'to draw (from)'
def: s.m. Drawing out, extraction; deduction
more: (inf. x. of نبط) s. m. Drawing out, extraction, deduction. استنباط کرنا istimbāt̤ karnā, To draw forth, extract, elicit.
subs: (-se), To draw forth, extract; to elicit; to deduce; to select.

ety: inf. n. x of مدّ 'to extend,' &c.
def: s.m. Desiring or begging assistance (madad), craving help; asking for supplies or subsidies; application for help or protection.
more: (inf. x. of مدد) s. f. Begging assistance.

ety: inf. n. x of مرّ 'to pass through'; 'to continue'
def: s.m. Continuation, continuance, perseverance; perpetuity, permanence; uninterrupted tenure of possession; (in law), fixed rent, not liable to alteration
more: (inf. x. of مرور) s. m. Continuation, perseverance, perpetuity.
subs: Holder of a farm or lease in perpetuity.

def: adj. Continuative, perpetual, permanent, unceasing; — s.f. Land rented on a fixed lease; land permanently settled; the permanent settlement (of Lord Cornwallis)
more: adj. Perpetual; continuative; never-ceasing. istimrārī , n. f. A piece of land on a fixed lease; land permanently settled; the permanent settlement of Lord Cornwallis. istimrārī paṭṭā , A lease or farm granted at a fixed rent; a lease in perpetuity. — paṭṭe-dār , n. m. Holder of a lease of land at a fixed rent. istimrārī muqarrar karnā , v. a. To fix in perpetuity. istimrārī band o bast, band o bast-i-istimrārī , n. m. Permanent settlement.
subs: s.m. Lease or farm granted at a fixed rent; lease in perpetuity
s.f. Fixed or perpetual assessment of rent

ety: inf. n. x of متع 'to enjoy'
def: s.m. Enjoying, reaping the fruits (of); being delighted; celebrating the solemnities of the festival of Mecca; — enjoyment (of a woman).
more: (inf. x. of متع) s. m. 1. Enjoying, reaping the fruits of, being delighted; celebrating the solemnities of the festival of Mecca; enjoyment (of a woman).

ety: inf. n. x of مزج
def: s.m. Seeking to discover one's purpose or wish (mizāj), sounding one's intention; asking an opinion.

ety: inf. viii of سند 'to lean (upon)'
def: s.m. Leaning or resting (upon).

ety: inf. n. x of انس 'to be or become familiar'
def: s.m. Familiarity, intimacy, sympathy.
more: (inf. x. of انس) s. m. Familiarity, intimacy, sympathy.

ety: inf. n. x of نجو 'to pass out of the body' (urine, &c.)
def: s.m. Ablution or purification after the offices of nature ( = āb-dast); making water; the private parts; — istinje-se istinjā laṛanā, To have carnal intercourse with
more: (inf. x. of نجا) s. m. Purification after the offices of nature; making water.
subs: s.m. A lump of earth or clay (such as is used for purification when water is not obtainable; hence), anything worthless
(-ke), To grow fast friends, become intimate.
wety: From Classical Persian استنجا (istinjā), from Arabic اِسْتِنْجَاء (istinjāʔ).

ety: inf. n. x of نشق 'to snuff up'
def: s.m. Throwing water up the nostrils when performing the waẓū; snuffing up the air, or odours, &c.
more: (inf. x. of نشق) s. m. 1. Throwing water into the nostrils when performing the waẓū. 2. Snuffing up the air or odours, &c.

ety: inf. n. x of روح 'to rest'
def: s.f. Ease, rest, repose, tranquillity; sleep.
more: (inf. x. of روح Heb. He respired; rested) s. f. Repose, rest, ease, tranquillity, sleep.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian اِسْتِرَاحَت (istirāhat), from Arabic اِسْتِرَاحَة (istirāḥa).

ety: inf. n. x of ردّ 'to return, reject'
def: s.m. Demanding restitution of anything, whether given, deposited in trust, or taken without consent; — revoking, recalling, retracting; reversing, repealing; rejecting; repelling, driving or forcing back
more: (inf. x. of ردّ) s. m. 1. Demanding restitution of any thing, whether given, deposited in trust, or taken without consent. 2. Repelling, driving or forcing back.
subs: v.t. To revoke, retract, repeal, annul, reverse, set aside
s.m. Reversal of a public sale.

def: v. a. Ped. for rad k . to send back. 1. To repeal; supersede; annul. 2. To set aside; disannul; abrogate; rescind; over rule; nullify; do away with; declare null and void. istirdād-i-nīlām , n. m. Reversal of a public sale.

ety: inf. n. x of رجع 'to return'
def: s.m. Returning (to God); having recourse to God during affliction or misfortune; repeating the words (of the Qorʼān, ii. 151) "Verily to God we belong, and verily unto Him we return."

ety: inf. n. x of رضو 'to be pleased'
def: s.f. Seeking to please; asking or seeking the consent; willingness, alacrity; pleasure; assent, consent ( = raẓā-mandī).
more: (inf. x. of رضا Heb. Was pleased) s. f. Seeking to please; willingness, alacrity.

ety: inf. n. x of سعد 'to be happy'
def: s.m. Desiring happiness; being fortunate; deeming or reckoning fortunate, auspicious or lucky; conceiving well of anything.
more: (inf. x. of سعد Heb. and Ch. Was happy, supported) s. m. Desiring happiness, being fortunate, considering any thing as a happy presage, conceiving well of any thing.

ety: inf. n. x of اصل 'to have root or foundation'
def: s.m. Rooting up, extirpating, eradicating, destroying, exterminating.
more: (inf. x. of اصل) s. m. Eradicating, pulling up by the roots, extirpating, destroying, extermination.

ety: inf. n. x of شہد 'to bear witness to'
def: s.m. Summoning witnesses; bringing testimony or proof; taking evidence; falling a martyr to religion.
more: (inf. x. of شہد) s. m. Summoning witnesses, bringing testimony or proof, taking evidence; falling a martyr for religion.

ety: inf. n. x of سقی 'to give to drink'
def: s.m. Dropsy ( = jalandar)
more: (inf. x. of سقي Heb. Was watered) s. m. The dropsy. استسقاي زقي istisḳā-i-ziḳḳī, Anasarca. استسقاي طبلي istisḳā-i-t̤ablī, Tympany. استسقاي لحمي istisḳā-i-laḥmī, A dropsy pervading all the members of the body.
subs: Dropsy of the whole body, Anasarca

ety: inf. n. x of ثقل 'to be heavy'
def: s.m. Heaviness; trouble; importunity.
more: (inf. x. of ثقل Heb. He weighed) s. m. Heaviness, trouble, importunity.

ety: inf. n. x of ثنی 'to double or fold'
def: s.m. Exception, exclusion, setting aside, distinction; rejection.
more: (inf. x. of ثني Heb. He turned, &c.) s. m. Exception, distinction, anomaly.

ety: inf. n. x of 'to make or construct'
def: s.m. Requisition of workmanship, forced labour; pressing into service.
adj. Exceptional.

ety: inf. n. x of صوب 'to pour forth'
def: s.m. Deeming right; approving, approbation; consulting as to what is right or proper to be done; consultation, reference; inquiry; taking the opinion of
more: (inf. x. of صواب) s. m. 1. Approving, approbation. 2. Consultation.
subs: v.t. To take the opinion (of), inquire (of); to refer (to); to consult.

ety: inf. n. x of طوع 'to be submis sive'
def: s.f. Power, ability; possibility; compliance with command, submission, obedience; dependence.
more: (inf. x. of طوع) s. f. 1. Power, possibility. 2. Submitting to, dependence.

ety: inf. n. viii of ستر 'to hide'
def: s.m. Act of concealing; concealment.
more: (inf. viii. of ستر Heb. He concealed) s. m. Concealment.

ety: inf. n. viii of سوي 'to be equal'
def: s.m. Equality; parallelism; what is plane, level or parallel; (the word is ordinarily met in the phrase) ḵẖat̤t̤i-istiwā, The equinoctial line, the equator.
(inf. viii. of سوي Heb. Was equal) s. Parallelism, equality. خط استوا ḵẖat̤t̤-i-istiwā, The equator.

ety: inf. n. x of ظہر 'to be apparent,' &c.
def: s.m. Seeking assistance; help, support; power; calling to mind, remembering; repeating by heart; reciting.
more: (inf. x. of ظہر) s. m. 1. Imploring assistance. 2. Calling to memory, remembering.

ety: S. स्त्री
def: s.f. Woman; wife
more: Māṛ. n. f. S. स्त्री from स्त्यै to conceive, Pr tiryā, tȳā, itthī . 1. A woman ( lugāī ). 2. Wife ( jorū ). is'trī barg,—jāt , n. f. The fair sex; womankind. is'trī dhan . Jointure; settlement made on a wife by her father or husband; paraphernalia. is'trī kar'nā , v. a. To marry; wed ( biyāh k .) is'trī gāmī , n. m. An adulterer ( ranḍī-bāz ).
subs: s.m. Settlement made on a wife by her father; jointure; wife's property or paraphernalia
v.t. To take a wife, to marry
s.m. One who goes after women, an adulterer
wety: Borrowed from Portuguese estirar.

def: n. (In Gram .) the feminine gender.
(pl. of اسطقس = Gr. στοιχεῖον), Elements, principles
This time, now.
s.m. = īśwar, q.v.
more: s. m. Ruler, master, lord, chief; Siva, God.

def: s.m. Ruler, master, lord; the Supreme Being, God; — a name of Śiva, of Kām-deʼo, &c.
more: n. m. S. ईश् to rule. God; lord; ruler; king; owner; husband; an epithet of Shiv , and Kām-deo. īshwar-ādhīn , n. m. A servant of God; one who is resigned. īshwar-ādhīntā , n. f. Subjection to God. īshwar-ārādhnā ; H. pūjā , n. f. The worship of God. īshwar-bhāo , n. m. The divine nature.
subs: adj. & s.m. Subject to or dependent on God; — one who is resigned to the Divine will, a servant of God
s.f. Subjection to, or dependence on, God
s.f. The worship of God ( = pūjā)
(˚ra+aṅ˚), s.m. lit. 'A part of God'; an epithet of created things, especially animals
(īśvara+vānī), s.f. The voice of God, revelation, inspiration, oracle
s.m. A worshipper of God, a pious person
s.m. Remembering God, calling God to mind
s.m. Any place of divine worship, temple, mosque, church, synagogue.
ex: ہم روزانہ ایشور سے دعا کرتے ہیں۔
ham rozāna īśvar se du'ā karte ha͠i.
We pray to God every day.
wety: Learned borrowing from Sanskrit ईश्वर (īśvara).

def: s.f. Supremacy, lordship; divineness of nature, divinity, Godhead; divine or Almighty power; the divine faculties of omnipresence, omnipotence, invisibility, &c.
s.f. Mistress, queen, goddess; name of Durgā; of Lakshmī, or of any other of the Śaktis or female energies of the deities.
more: s. m. Grandeur, glory, majesty, pomp, wealth, state.

def: adj. Pertaining to deity; divine, godlike.

s.f. = aiśwarya, q.v. s.m. Control, dominion, sway, supremacy, power, might; grandeur, glory, pomp, wealth, prosperity, greatness, majesty, state; superhuman power, omnipotence (of the Deity); the divine faculties of omnipresence, invisibility, &c.
s. f. Divinity, godhead.
s.f. Supremacy, lordship; divineness of nature, divinity, Godhead; divine or Almighty power; the divine faculties of omnipresence, omnipotence, invisibility, &c.
For this reason, because.
v.s.v. اس is.

ety: inf. n. of عصی 'to disobey, to rebel,' &c.
def: s.m. Disobedience, rebellion; sin, transgression.
more: (from عصا Ch. and Syr. and To commit violence, to resist, to rebel) s. m. Sin, transgression.
wety: From Arabic عِصْيَان (ʕiṣyān).

def: s.f. = īṅṭ, q.v. s.f. Brick-work, building in brick; a structure of brick
subs: lit. 'To strike or sound one brick against another'; to throw down, raze, or demolish a building; to lay in ruins
baj-jānā, To be thrown down, razed, demolished, laid in ruins
To reduce a brick house to dust, to demolish a brick house; — to destroy the prosperity of a house, to reduce to poverty
īṅṭ-kā ghar maṭṭī honā or ho-jānā
To be brought low from a state of prosperity and affluence, to be reduced to poverty
s.m. A boys' game (one boy throws a stone which others try to hit, and he who is successful rides on the back of the first thrower as far as the stone thrown by him).

def: adv. 1. Here, there, and every where; hither and thither; on this side and the other; to and fro; all about. It ut phirat rahat auran saṅg, Mo ko det nīk nahīṅ darshan . Dās Madāri. 2. Evasion; putting off. Lālā, it ut mat karo. it ut kar'nā, itā utā kar'nā , Rus. v. a. To place here and there; to conceal; secrete. Chaukī-dār ko dekh-kar choroṅ ne māl it ut kar dȳā .

ety: S. इतद्
def: adv. Now, at this time, at present.
more: adj. m. Thus much, &c. See اتنا itnā.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian اَتَا (atā), from a Turkic language.

ety: S. इतस् or इत्र
def: adv. Here, hither
subs: adv. Here and there, hither and thither; this side and that, to and fro.

ety: inf. n. iv of طوع 'to be or become submissive'
def: s.f. Obedience, submission, subjection, subordination, fealty, allegiance; observance; reverence, worship, homage; obsequiousness
more: (inf. iv. of طوع) s. f. Obeying, obedience, submission, obsequiousness, observance, reverence, worshipping. اطاعت کرنا it̤āʼaﻌt karnā, To obey.
subs: (-kī), To obey, do the bidding (of); to submit (to); to observe; to comply (with); to serve, pay homage (to); to worship.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian اِطَاعَت (itā'at), borrowed from Arabic إِطَاعَة (ʔiṭāʕa), from أَطَاعَ (ʔaṭāʕa). First attested in c. 1500 as Middle Hindi اِطاعَت (at̤a't /⁠itā'at⁠/).

ety: S. इयत्+क
def: adv. So much, this much.
more: adj. (dakh.) This much, thus much: see اتنا itnā.

ety: S. एतद्+ काल
def: adv. At this time, now, at present ( = اتا itā).
adv. Now, &c. = itāl, q.v. adv. At this time, now, at present ( = اتا itā).
more: adv. (dakh.) Now: see ايتا ītā and اتال itāl.

ety: S. तॄ?
def: part. adj. Apprized, cautioned, warned; on one's guard, &c. The word is only met with in the phrase اترجانا itar jānā, To be apprized, &c.; to suspect. (Cf. تاڙجانا tāṛ jānā.)
more: adj. Affected, giving oneʼs self airs, playful, wanton, coquetish.

def: v. n. Ṭhagī . To be forewarned (a traveller) against robbers.

ety: v.n. of اترانا itrānā, q.v.
def: adj. Walking or acting affectedly; strutting; affected; playful, wanton, coquettish; giving oneself airs, pompous, ostentatious, consequential, conceited, proud, haughty, arrogant

ety: see itrānā
def: adj. & s.m. Acting affectedly, affected, apish; — affected person, swaggerer, swell.
more: (Rare). n. m. H. itrānā . A swaggerer; a swell. Ītar ke ghar tītar, bāhar bāṅdhūṅ ki bhītar? Prov. A swell a partridge found—"inside or out," the question he doth oft propound. ☞ He makes as much of it as though he were a valuable horse. He would like to keep the bird outside that every one may see his rich prize, but then the risk?
part. act. (from اترانا itrānā, q. v.) Acting affectedly, &c. airy, apish.

def: (Braj) = اتا ittā, q.v. adj. (f. -ī) & adv. This much or many, &c. ( = اتنا itnā, q.v.). adj. (f. -ī), As much as this, this much; so much, so many
more: (in Braj) adj. This much, so much: see اتنا itnā.
subs: s.m. Small matter; small quantity; trifle
adv. By this time; all this time
adv. In the meantime, meanwhile; at this moment; upon this.

(Braj) = (1) ات ita, and, (2), اتنے itne, qq.v. adv. Here, hither
subs: adv. Here and there, hither and thither; this side and that, to and fro.

def: (Prov.) = اتنا itnā, q.v. adj. (f. -ī), As much as this, this much; so much, so many
more: adj. So much, thus much. اتیک مین itek meṅ, In the mean time.
subs: s.m. Small matter; small quantity; trifle
adv. By this time; all this time
adv. In the meantime, meanwhile; at this moment; upon this.

ety: inf. n. iv of طفأ 'to become extinguished' (fire)
def: s.m. Extinction or quenching (of fire).
more: (inf. iv. of طفا Ch. Was extinguished) s. m. Extinction (of fire).

def: adj. Desired, beloved, &c. = ishṭa, q.v. part. adj. Desired, wished for; approved; cherished, beloved; reverenced, worshipped; — s.m. An object of desire, love or reverence; a god, deity; a beloved person; one chosen or favoured of a god or goddess; faith, trust, love
See اشٿ ish̤ṭ.

ety: inf. n. iv of طہر 'to become pure'
def: s.m. Purifying; purification.

ety: S. इषिता, rt. इष्
def: s.f. Spear, lance; spear staff; the cat in the boys' game of 'cat and trap'
subs: (ḍandā), The ball and crook in the game of ćaugān.

ety: S. आ+वेष्ट् or वृत्
def: v.n. To walk affectedly or coquettishly; to express tenderness or kindness by gestures; — to speak affectedly, to drawl; to roll or mouth one's words; to mumble; to stammer; to lisp; to speak indistinctly; — to evade a direct answer (to a question or remark); to give a pert answer; to speak snappishly, crossly or rudely; to affect ignorance.
more: v. a. To walk affectedly or coquettishly, to express tenderness or kindness by gesture.

def: adv. This much, thus much, so much; — (at the end of a book, chapter, letter, &c.) finis.
= ات itī, q.v. adv. This much, thus much, so much; — (at the end of a book, chapter, letter, &c.) finis.
more: thus. A particle signifying, thus, therefore, lo, behold. iti , n. f. Finis; the end; as ziyādah cheh , and faqat in Persian, and tam in Arabic, at the end of a book, letter, etc.

a particle implying Cause, manifestation, reference, something additional, conclusion: and may be translated by Thus therefore, lo, behold, et cetera, so says, finis, the end; in which latter sense it is usually written like زیاده چه in Persian and تم in Arabic, at the end of a book, letter, &c.

def: s.f. Any calamity of the season (as drought, excessive rain, noxious insects, &c.); swarm of gnats, mosquitoes, &c.; seasons? ( = ṛtod;itu).
wety: Learned borrowing from Sanskrit अयुत (ayúta).

ety: S. इषिता, rt. इष्
def: s.f. Spear, lance; spear staff; the cat in the boys' game of 'cat and trap'
subs: (ḍandā), The ball and crook in the game of ćaugān.

def: n. m. S. इति-ह-आस, so indeed it was. 1. Narrative; account; story; tale; personal narrative; biography; adventures; journal; sketch; memoir. 2. History ( tavārīkh ); chronicles; annals; traditions.
= اتہاس itihās, q.v. s.m. Story, fable, narrative, annals, history; tradition
more: s.m. History, heroick history, story, fable.

def: s.m. Story, fable, narrative, annals, history; tradition
wety: Learned borrowing from Sanskrit इतिहास (itihāsa).

ety: inf. n. viii of الف 'to become sociable,' &c.
def: s.m. Familiarity, friendship, society, company, connection, correspondence.
more: (inf. viii. of الف) s. m. Familiarity, friendship, society, connexion, company, correspondence.

ety: inf. n. iv of طلق 'to become loosed'
def: s.m. Loosing, setting at liberty; divorcing, repudiating; disengagedness, freedom; application, reference; rendering absolute or universal
more: Ped. n. m. Application; reference. itlāq rakh'nā . To be applicable; correspond with.
(inf. iv. of طلق) s. m. 1. Setting at liberty; divorcing; disengagedness; freedom. 2. Rendering absolute or universal.
subs: (-se), To be separate (from), to be independent (of); to correspond (with), to be applicable (to); — it̤lāq karnā (-par), To apply (to); to use (a word or phrase in a certain sense).

ety: inf. n. iv of طمع 'to covet'
def: s.m. Strong desire, longing, covetousness.

ety: inf. n. iv of تم
def: s.m. Perfection, completion, accomplishment
more: n. m. Ped. Perfection; completion (pūrā-pan) . itmām kar'nā , v. a. To complete; perfect (pūrā k) .
(inf. iv. of تمام) s. m. Perfecting, perfection, completion, accomplishment. اتمام کرنا itmām karnā, To complete, accomplish, perfect. اتمام هونا itmām honā, To be completed, &c.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian اتمام (itmām), from Arabic إِتْمَام (ʔitmām).

ety: inf. n. iv of طمأن 'to be or become at rest'
def: s.m. Quiet, rest, repose, calm, peace, tranquillity, composure; content, satisfaction; security; assurance, confidence, reliance, trust; surety, guarantee
more: (inf. iv. of طمأن) s. f. Tranquillity, rest, repose, quiet, content, security. اطمینان خاطر it̤mīnān-i-ḵẖāt̤ir, Peace of mind.
subs: v.t. To trust (in), rely (on), feel assured (of); to believe (in), to credit
(-ko), To feel reassured, feel at ease; to be satisfied.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian اِطْمِینَان (itmīnān), from Arabic اِطْمِئْنَان (iṭmiʔnān).

ety: S. इयत्ता, Pr. एत्तिणा
def: adj. (f. -ī), As much as this, this much; so much, so many
more: adj. S. इयत् Pr. एत्तिणा. So much; this much; thus much; so many; so. Itne men kām ban jaëga . That will do. it'nā ut'nā , Pop. ittā uttā , Rus. A small matter; a little more or less; a small quantity; a trifle. Itne utne kī kuchh parvā nahīṅ . Such trifles don't matter. it'ne meṅ , adv. At this moment or juncture; in the mean time; mean while; upon this.

v. n. S. अठ to go, अद् to eat. (?) 1. To hold; to be contained; go into (a box); admit of. Muṭṭhī meṅ aṭe, koṭhī meṅ na aṭe . Riddle. Ans. Chhatrī , umbrella. You may hold it in your fist, but you cannot get it through the door. 2. To fit. Yeh jūtā mere pair meṅ nahīṅ aṭtā . 3. To be filled or full; to be choked up. 1. Kūṛe se kuā aṭ gayā . 2. Us āṅdhī meṅ, ahā hā hā! ajab ham ne maze māre. Falak par aish o ishrat ke dikhāī de gaë tāre. Raqīboṅ kī main ab khuārī, kharābī, kyā kahūn, bāre? Tale kothe ke baiṭhe aṭ gaë sab gard ke māre. Bharī nathnoṅ meṅ unke khāk das das ser āṅdhī meṅ . Nazīr. Oh! in that storm, oh dear! strange ravishment I snatched, The starry sky of pleasure shone before my eyes, My rivals—how describe their sad plight and disgrace. Down in the street below with dust they were all choked, Full ten ten seers of dust were in each nostril stuffed.
adj. m. As much as this, thus much, so much, so many. اتني مین itne meṅ, In the mean time, mean-while, mean-time.
subs: s.m. Small matter; small quantity; trifle
adv. By this time; all this time
adv. In the meantime, meanwhile; at this moment; upon this.

def: (Braj.) = اتنا itnā, q.v. adj. (f. -ī), As much as this, this much; so much, so many
subs: s.m. Small matter; small quantity; trifle
adv. By this time; all this time
adv. In the meantime, meanwhile; at this moment; upon this.

def: s.m. Perfume, fragrance; essence; ottar (or otto) of roses, &c.
more: n. m. Pl. itryāt . 1. Essence; otto of roses, etc. Kar phulel ko āchaman, mīṭhā kahat sarāhi, Chup rauh re, gandhī sughaṛ, atar dikhāvat kāhi? The hair oil by the oaf gulped down, he says 'how sweet!' 'Wise perfumer! your scents fore such to set 2. Scent ( khushbū ). itr-dān ; Illit. atar-dān , n. m. A scent case. itr kheṅchnā, yā nikālnā , v. a. To extract essences. itr yā atar lagānā yā malnā , v. n. To rub scent on the body or dress. tavāzo-i-itr o pān, itr o pān kī tavāzo , Presenting perfume and betel to a visitor. ( Native etiquette ).
(prop. iﻌt̤r ) s. m. Perfume, fragrance, essence, ottar (of roses, &c.). عطر دان aﻌt̤r-dān, A perfume-box or receptacle for perfume. عطر مالي aﻌt̤r-māl-ī, s. f. The rubbing of perfume.
subs: (-meṅ), To apply perfume or ʻit̤r to the body or clothes
(-par), To rub perfume (on), &c. ( = ʻit̤r lagānā, q.v.)
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian عطر ('itr), from Arabic عِطْر (ʕiṭr).

ety: S. अति+क्रमणं
def: v.n. To exult greatly or unduly (by reason of, -par, wealth, success, &c.); to behave with pride, or self-conceitedness, or boastfulness, or arrogance, or insolence; to give oneself airs (by reason of), to be conceited or vain or supercilious; to act affectedly or coquettishly; to strut, swagger, show off.
more: v. a. S. तृ to flow. 1. To give one's self airs; to be vain or proud. 1. Phir tujh meṅ fazūṅ hai kaun sī bāt? Jis par itrātī hai tū din rāt . Rangīn. In what respect then are you more then me, I pray, That you must give yourself such airs all night and day? 2. Kaun aisā hai, dadā, jis par ki itrātī hai tū? Koī paidā phir nayā kyā chāhne-wālā kȳā? Rangīn. What wondrous being, nurse, makes you so mince and swell, Another lover new fast-bound within your spell? 2. To be affected; to behave coquettishly. 3. To strut; swagger; show off. Ām phale, neo chale, aranḍ phale itrāë . Prov. The mango tree fruit-laden bends, the castor tosses its head up high. 4. To lift up one's self; to raise one's head. Phr. To toss the head; to hold up one's head; to be cock-a-whoop; to ride the high horse. Huā hai shah kā musāhib, phire hai itrātā; Wagarna shahr meṅ Gālib kī ābrū kyā hai? Gālib. Witll what an ai…
v. a. To give oneʼs self airs, assume airs, act with affectation, to act in an unnatural or unusual manner.

def: adj. (f. اترائي itrāʼī), Conceited, vain, consequential, supercilious, proud, haughty, arrogant; strutting; affected; playful, wanton, coquettish.
s.m. = اتري پهل itrī-phal, q.v. s.m. An electuary composed of three sorts of myrobalans with coriander seed and honey (commonly ترپهلا tirphalā).

ety: S. त्रि+फला
def: s.m. An electuary composed of three sorts of myrobalans with coriander seed and honey (commonly ترپهلا tirphalā).
more: n. m. An electuary composed of three sorts of Myrobalans, with coriander seed and honey.

def: s.m. = اتري پهل itrī-phal, q.v. s.m. An electuary composed of three sorts of myrobalans with coriander seed and honey (commonly ترپهلا tirphalā).
s.f. pl. (of next, q.v.), Perfumes, &c.

ety: for A. عطرية ʻit̤r+aff. īyat
def: s.f. Fragrance, perfume, odour, scent.

ety: S. इयत्ता
def: adj. (f. -ī) & adv. This much or many, &c. ( = اتنا itnā, q.v.). adj. (f. -ī), As much as this, this much; so much, so many
subs: s.m. Small matter; small quantity; trifle
adv. By this time; all this time
adv. In the meantime, meanwhile; at this moment; upon this.

def: = اتنے itne, q.v.s.v. اتنا itnā.

ety: inf. n. viii. of وحد
def: s.m. Union, concord, intimate friendship; combination, league, compact, treaty.
more: n. m. احد one. Ped. for ekā . 1. Union; combination; friendship; amity; concord. 2. Covenant; league; compact; treaty of alliance; convention.
(inf. viii. of وحد Heb. Was one) s. m. Union, amity, concord, friendship.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian اِتِّحَاد (ittihād), borrowed from Arabic اِتِّحَاد (ittiḥād), from اِتَّحَدَ (ittaḥada).

ety: inf. n. viii. of تبع
def: s.m. Following, obeying; obedience, allegiance, fidelity ( = تابع داري tābiʻ-dārī, q.v.).

ety: inf. n. viii. of وفق
def: s.m. Concurrence, agreement, accord, correspondence, coincidence; equality; union, unity, concord, harmony, unison, conformity; amity, friendship, affection; similarity of disposition; assent, consent; concert, combination, confederation, conspiracy, collusion; probability, contingency, case, event; circumstance, incident, affair, particular; opportunity; accident, chance, lot, fortune
more: n. m. وفق agreeing. 1. Agreement; concurrence; coincidence; correspondence; accordance; accord. 2. Unison; conformity; consonance. 3. Union (ekā) ; unity; concord; harmony. Ittifāq baṛī chīz hai . Prov. saying. Union is a great thing. 4. Assent; consent; acquiescence. 5. Combination; concert; co-operation. Kāith, kavve meṅ baṛā ittifāq hai . Prov. Kāiths , and crows are close confederacies. 6. Collusion; conspiracy ( sāzish ). 7. Friendship; amity; affection; brotherhood. 1. Mȳāṅ, bībī kā ittifāq banā rahe . Benediction. May the wife and husband ever be united. 2. Āpas meṅ ittifāq rakkho . Live in peace. 8. Circumstance; event; case; contingency; incident; adventure. Safar meṅ kyā kyā ittifāq hue? 9. Affair; proceeding; particular. 10. Opportunity; chance; accident; lot. (sanjog) . 1. Ittifāq hai jo gaī chīz mile . It's a chance if a lost thing is ever found again. 2. Ajab mulk dekhne k…

(inf. viii. of وفق) s. m. 1. Agreement, concord, concurrence, friendship, conspiracy, collusion, similarity of disposition. 2. Chance, fortune, accident, incident, success, opportunity. 3. Equality. 4. Probability. اتفاق حسنه ittifāḳ-i-ḥasana, or اتفاقات حسنه ittifāḳāt-i-ḥasana, s. m. Unexpected good fortune, agreeable accidents, good luck. اتفاق کرنا ittifāḳ karna, To accord or agree together, to concur, to unite, to conspire, to happen. اتفاق هونا ittifāḳ honā, To happen, to be agreed.
subs: v.n. To accord, agree together, harmonize; to suit, be opportune or favourable; to turn out well
v.n. To happen, chance, come to pass, occur, turn out, fall out, betide; to arise; to ensue
(-se), To be in accord (with); to be on terms of intimacy, friendship, &c. (with); to live peaceably together
adv. Concurrently, conjointly, together, in conjunction with, in communication with; by chance, accidentally, incidentally; occasionally, rarely; scarcely
To accord, agree, concur, unite; to form an intimacy or alliance (with, -se), to harmonize (with); to combine, conspire (against, -par); to co-operate
To be at accord, to agree, be agreed, be of one mind, be in harmony (with, -se); to correspond (to, -se); to growintimate, become fast friends.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian اِتِّفَاق (ittifāq), from Arabic اِتِّفَاق (ittifāq). First attested in c. 1618 as Middle Hindi اتفاق (atfaq).

ety: Ar. acc. of ittifāq
def: adv. Accidentally, by chance; by the way, occasionally, rarely; scarcely.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian اتفاقاً (ittifāqan), itself from Arabic اِتِّفَاقًا (ittifāqan).

ety: pl. of ittifāq
def: s.m. Accidents, occurrences, events; ittifāqāt-i-ḥasana (and ittifāq-i-ḥasana), s.m. Agreeable accidents or surprises; unexpected good fortune, good luck.
more: Ped. n. m. Pl. of اِتفاق q. v.
s. m. plur. (of اتفاق) Accidents, successes.

def: adj. Concurring, accidental, casual, occasional, incidental.
more: adj. Accidental; casual; occasional; fortuitous; incidental.
adj. 1. Accidental, casual, fortuitous. 2. Agreeing, concurring.

def: adj. Concurring, accidental, casual, occasional, incidental.

ety: inf. n. viii of وهم
def: s.m. Suspicion; censure; (in law) charge, imputation.
more: (inf. viii. of وهم) s. m. Suspicion, impeachment, accusation, censure.
wety: Borrowed from Arabic اِتِّهَام (ittihām).

ety: inf. n. viii. of وقي
def: s.m. Avoiding, shunning, abstaining (from, -se); piety, abstinence.
more: (inf. viii. of وقي) s. m. Avoiding, shunning; abstaining from evil; piety.

ety: inf. n. viii. of وقف
def: s.m. Restraining one's senses; abstaining, fasting (as in the month of Ramazān).

ety: inf. n. viii of طلع 'to rise, ascend, appear'
def: s.f. Manifesting, declaring; announcement, notice, information, intimation, advice, notification; knowledge, cognizance, insight, acquaintance
more: n. f. Information; notice; knowledge; advice; cognizance; letter of advice; intimation; intelligence; communication. ittilā kar'nā , v. a. 1. To refer; direct; acquaint; tell. 2. To apprize; notify; announce; make known; signify; advise; give notice; report; set forth; send word; write to. ittilā-nāmah , n. m. A written declaration; a summons or citation; a written notice.

(inf. viii. of طلوع) s. f. Manifesting, notice, declaring, investigation, information, informing, knowledge, insight. ¶ it̤lāﻌ (inf. iv. of طلوع) Information. اطلاع کرنا it̤t̤ilāﻌ karnā, To acquaint, inform, apprize.
subs: (se), To inform or apprize (of), acquaint (with); to report; to announce, notify; to intimate; to make known; to refer (to); to direct
s.m. A written notification or declaration, written notice; a summons or citation
(-par), To be known (to); to come to the knowledge or cognizance (of)
s.f. Receipt or acknowledgment of a notification, notice, or intimation, &c.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian اِطِّلَاع (ittilā'), borrowed from Arabic اِطِّلَاع (iṭṭilāʕ), from اِطَّلَعَ (iṭṭalaʕa).

ety: acc. of it̤t̤ilāʻ
def: adv. By way of announcement or intimation; for information.
adj. That gives intimation or information; for the purpose of announcing, apprising, or giving notice.

ety: inf. n. viii. of وصف
def: s.m. Description; praise; qualification; excellence.

ety: inf. n. viii. of وصل
def: s.m. Conjunction, contact; contiguity, neighbourhood; connection, adhesion, union, attachment.
more: n. m. Ped. for mel . 1. Contact; connection (lagāo) . 2. Adhesion; union (joṛ) . 3. Contiguity; attachment.
(inf. viii. of وصل) s. m. Conjunction, contact, adhesion, union, continuity, attachment, neighbourhood, contiguity, adjacency.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian اِتِّصال (ittisāl), from Arabic اِتِّصَال (ittiṣāl).

def: n. m. S. इति thus, आदि beginning. Etcetera; and so forth; and so on ( wagairah ).

ety: S. आदित्य+वार
def: s.m. Sunday.
more: n. m. S. आदित्य the sun, वार day. Sunday, the Sabbath day.
wety: Inherited from Sanskrit आदित्यवार (ādityavāra).

def: adj. & s.m. Et cœtera, and so forth; and other, and others.
adj. Pertaining to the rest.
conj. Thus, like, in like manner as; as, in some way, almost, scarcely.
wety: From Classical Persian او (ō).

r: ʻiwaẓ, ke, ʻiwaẓ denā, ko, ʻiwaẓ lenā, se, badlā lenā, ʻiwaẓ-muʻāwaẓa, muʻāwaẓ
ety: inf. n. of عوض 'to give (one
def: s.m. Interchange, exchange, barter
more: n. m. See بدلا 1. A substitute; succedaneum . 2. An amends. 3. Penalty; forfeit. evaz irsāl . Return of a writ. evaz denā , v. a. To make compensation; to reimburse; repay ( badlā denā ). evaz lenā , v. a. To pay one off ( badlā lenā ).
s. m. Reward, retribution, return, retaliation, any thing substituted for another, exchange, recompense. adv. Instead, for.
subs: or baʻiwaẓ, adv. As a substitute (for, -ke), in lieu (of), in exchange (for), in return, in satisfaction, as compensation or indemnity; mutatis mutandis; in supersession (of).

def: s.m. = ʻiwaẓ, q.v.; — adv. As a substitute; by way of compensation, or return, &c.

ety: rel. n. fr. ʻiwaẓ
def: adj. & s.m. Officiating, acting (for), in charge; — a substitute; a person officiating or acting (for another), a locum tenens
more: n. f. 1. A substitute; representative. 2. The person officiating; a locum tenens. evazī , adj. Officiating; acting, in charge. evzī denā , v. a. To supply a substitute (as a servant). evzī rakhnā , v. a. To take or accept a substitute. evzī k. , v. a. To officiate; to act in the place of.
subs: To give or provide a substitute
To receive or accept a substitute
To act as a substitute, to officiate (for).

ety: for A. عيادة, inf. n. of عود 'to come repeatedly, to visit'
def: s.f. Visiting (of the sick)
more: n. f. See bīmārpursī. ayādat k., byorā lenā , v. a. To ask after the health of a sick person.
s. f. Visiting of the sick.
subs: (-kī), To visit (a sick person); to make inquiries after the health (of a sick person).
ex: آخر ذرا کھڑے کھڑے ایک صاحب کی عیادت کے لیے چلے گئے
In the end, they made their way to visit a [sick] gentlemen impromptu
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian عیادت ('iyādat, “visitation of the sick”), itself from Arabic عِيَادَة (ʕiyāda, “visit, consultation”) - verbal noun of عَادَ (ʕāda, “to visit a patient”).

def: s.m. Stag; deer, hart; wild goat.
more: s. m. A stag, a mountain goat.

ety: for A. ايلة, rt. آل for اول
def: s.f. Rule, government, dominion.
more: (inf. iv. of اول) s. f. Dominion, government.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian اِیَالَت (iyālat), borrowed from Arabic إِيَالَة (ʔiyāla).

ety: inf. n. of عاير 'to measure, compare,' &c., iii of عير 'to come and go, to move to and fro'
def: s.m. A standard (of measure, weight, or fineness); mark, proof, test, touchstone, assay.
more: n. m. A knave; an impostor. aīyār , adj. Crafty ( chālāk ).
s. m. A mark, proof. test, standard, assay, touch. ¶ aﻌiyār (adj. superl. of عير) or عيارا aﻌiyārā, adj. Cunning, sly, shrewd, artful. s. m. A knave.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian عیار (iyār), from Arabic عِيَار (ʕiyār).

def: (ʻiyāẕaṉ, acc. of ʻiyāẕ, inf. n. of عوذ 'to seek protection,' &c.), 'By flying for refuge to God,' (which is equivalent to) God avert, Heaven forefend.
adv. When; lo, behold.

ety: inf. n. iv of اذي 'To be annoyed,' &c.
def: s.f. Annoyance, molestation, vexation, pain, trouble, distress, harm, hurt, injury; (syn. dukh)
more: (inf. iv. of اذيت) s. f. Hurting, injuring, harm, pain, trouble, vexation, distress, affliction. ايذادينا īẕā denā, To injure, pain, trouble, vex, distress, afflict, hurt, offend. ايذادهندي īẕā-dihandī, s. f. Giving pain, tormenting.
subs: īẕā denā (-ko), To annoy, molest, vex, &c.
īzā-rasān, adj. & s.m. Annoying, molesting, &c.; — one who gives annoyance, &c.
īẕā rasānī, s.f. The occasioning of annoyance, injury, &c.

ety: corr. of A. ziyāda
def: s.m. Increase, augmentation, addition
more: n. Ped. for H. baṛhotrī . Additions; augmentation; increase. īzād kar'nā , Ped. for ziyāda k . q. v.

ety: inf. n. iv of ضعف 'to exceed'
def: s.m. Doubling, duplication.

ety: = iẓāfat
def: s.m. Addition, annexation; increase, augmentation; increment, adjunct; accretion; surplus, excess; attribute; allowance, scholarship
more: n. m. 1. Addition; increase; augmentation ( baṛhotrī ). 2. Increment; adjunct; the thing added; accretion. 3. Surplus ( bachat ); excess. izāfah-i-tankhuāh , Ped. n. m. Increase of salary. izāfah kar'nā , v. a. To increase; enhance; raise; augment.
s. m. Addition, junction, annexion, annexation, augmentation, attribute.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian اِضَافَه (izāfa), borrowed from Arabic إِضَافَة (ʔiḍāfa), from أَضَافَ (ʔaḍāfa).

ety: for A. اضافة, inf. n. iv of ضيف 'to incline' (to)
def: s.f. Lit. 'the annexation'; (in Gram.), prefixing a noun to a noun, so that the former governs the latter in the genitive case (e.g. g̠ulām-i-Zaid, 'the slave of Zaid'); the connection of a noun so prefixed with its complement; the short vowel kasra between two nouns in the formation of the genitive case, or on the addition of an adjective; addition, adjunct, &c. = iẓāfa, q.v.
more: (inf. iv. of ضیف) s. f. Addition, adjunct, reference, annexion; construction of one noun with another.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian اِضَافَت (izāfat), from Arabic إِضَافَة (ʔiḍāfa).

ety: inf. n. iv of زال for زول 'to depart,' &c.
def: s.m. Removing; annulling; taking away; removal; abolition; (in Gram.) elision of a letter or of a vowel point from a word
more: n. m. Ped. A. زول It departed, ceased to be. 1. Removal; abolition. 2. ( Gram .) The elision of a letter or vowel point. izā'la-i-amān , Ped. n. m. Forfeiture. izāla-i-bikr kar'nā , Ped. for H. kuār-pat utārnā , v. a. To take away one's virginity; to commit a rape. izāla-i-haisy'at-i-urfī , Ped. for H. lālī bigāṛ'nā . Defamation. izālā kar'nā , v. a. To remove; put away.
(inf. iv. of زول) s. m. Removal, abolition; (in grammar) elision of a letter or of a vowel point from a word.
subs: v.t. To deprive of virginity, to deflower; to commit a rape
s.m. Robbing of one's good name, defamation
v.t. To remove, annul, abolish, take away, deprive; to put away.

def: s.m. pl. (of ʻaz̤m), Bones; — s.m. pl. (of ʻaz̤īm) The great.
more: s. 1. plur. (of عظم) Bones. 2. plur. (of عظيم) Great, the great. ¶ uﻌz̤ām (or iﻌz̤z̤ām ) adj. Great.

ety: inf. n. iv of ذعن 'to be tractable'
def: s.m. Obedience, submission; confidence, belief.
more: (inf. iv. of ذعن) s. m. 1. Obedience, submission. 2. Confidence, belief.

def: s.f. Drawers, trousers (syn. pāʼe-jāma)
more: n. f. Drawers; trousers ( paijāmā ). 1. Lambī lambī ṭāṅgeṅ, phaṭī izār, Bagal meṅ buqchā, chalīṅ bazār! "Sūt logī, buā"? Prov. Long long legs, and trousers tattered and torn, A bundle tucked under her arm, to market ho! "Buy any thread, lady?" 2. Izār ṭāṅgoṅ meṅ sābit, na pāoṅ meṅ paizār, Khasam milā hai, nigoṛā, chamār kyā hogā! Wom. Rāhat. Nor trousers whole, nor slippers to my feet! Poor wretch! a husband has—no cobbler worse.
s. m. Trousers or drawers less wide than the پايجامه pāʼe-jāma (Qanoon-e-islam).
subs: s.m. The string with which drawers āre tied, trouser-strings
(-ke), To lay hands on the trouser-strings; to evince desire for, or to contemplate, carnal intercourse
(-meṅ), To run the string into drawers

adj. m. (f. -kī ḍhīlī), Ready for carnal intercourse, libidinous, lecherous, wanton, of easy virtue (a woman); — s.m. A rake, debauchee; — izār-band-kī ḍhīlī, s.f. A woman of easy virtue, an unchaste woman
s.m. Connection through a wife or mistress; petticoat interest
(-ko), To treat with levity, to disregard, feel no care or concern (for); to be fearless (of), indifferent (to, — used by women).
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian ازار (izār), from Arabic إِزَار (ʔizār).

def: s.m. The cheek, face.

n. m. The strings with which drawers are tied; trouser-strings ( nāṛā ). izār-band pe hāth ḍāl'nā , v. a. lit . To lay one's hand on the strings of (a woman's) trousers. To contemplate carnal intercourse. Mardoṅ ke izār-baṅd pe hāth ḍāltā hai? Dekh! pīche ghunḍiyāṅ lagī haiṅ. Mazāq . Facetiae. īzār-baṅd kī ḍhī'lī, izār-baṅd kā ḍhī'lā, laṅgoṭe kā ḍhīlā , adj. 1. Libidinous; wanton; lecherous; lascivious. 2. Ready for carnal intercourse; frail; unchaste; riggish; given to venery; of easy virtue. Aisī izār-baṅd kī tum ḍhīlī ho gaīṅ, Paṛ jātī ho har ek ke āge pasār-ke . Wom. Jān Sāhab. izār-band kī ḍhīlī , n. f. A woman of easy virtue. izār-baṅd kā ḍhīlā, laṅgoṭe kā ḍhīlā , n. m. A rake; Don Juan; a debauchee; an adulterer ( aīyāsh ). izār-baṅd na khul'nā , v. n. lit . Not to let down one's trousers. Not to sleep with one of the opposite sex; to have no custom or knock at the door (a prostitute). izār-baṅdī rishtā . Connection through a wife or mistress; petticoat interest. Izār-baṅdī rishte pe kūdte haiṅ . He is cock-a-whoop of his sister's connections. izār meṅ pahin lenā , Wom. v. n. 1. To make light of; disregard; not to care for. Chhokrī tū ne izār meṅ pahin lȳā, ek nahīṅ suntī . Mah. Wom. 2. Not to fear; to be fearless. Laṛke ne sab ko izār meṅ pahin lȳā, kisī kā ḍar nahīṅ māntā . Mah. Wom.
more: s. m. The string with which drawers are tied. ازاربندي رشته izār-band-ī rishta, Connexion through a wife; petticoat interest.

ety: inf. n. viii of زحم 'to push or press against'
def: s.m. Concourse, crowd, throng, pressing or rushing together of people.
more: (inf. viii. of زحم) s. m. A concourse, a crowd, a throng, a rushing together of people.

ety: inf. n. viii of زاج for زوج 'to pair or couple'
def: s.m. Marriage; wedding.
more: Ped. n. m. زاج coupling. Marriage; nuptials; wedding ( biyāh ).
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian اِزْدِوَاج (izdiwāj), from Arabic اِزْدِوَاج (izdiwāj).

ety: inf. n. viii of زاد for زيد 'to increase'
def: s.m, Increase, augmentation, addition.
more: (inf. viii. of زید) s. m. Increase, augmentation.

ety: inf. n. iv of ظہر 'to appear, be manifest,' &c.
def: s.m. Manifestation, revelation, disclosure, demonstration, publication, display, declaration; statement, declaration in a court of justice or before police officers; information; examination of a witness, deposition, evidence, written testimony
more: (inf. iv. of ظہور) s. m. Manifestation, revelation, disclosure, demonstration, publication, display, declaration. اظہار کرنا iz̤hār karnā, To disclose, reveal, notify, propose.
subs: s.m. Deposition in writing; written testimony (opp. of iz̤hār-i-zabānī)
v.t. To give publicity (to); to make a deposition; to depose, testify, give evidence, bear witness (to)
s.m. A complimentary (but illegal) fee paid to the writer of a deposition
s.m. Legal declaration; statement conformable to law
v.t. To disclose, reveal, expose; to publish, make known, notify; to declare, affirm; to describe, explain
(-kā), To take the deposition (of); to examine (a witness)
s.m. A deposition writer, an officer of the court who takes down depositions.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian اِظْهَار (izhār), from Arabic إِظْهَار (ʔiẓhār).

def: s. (dakh.) See ازدحام izdiḥām.

ety: inf. n. iv of ذکر 'to remember'
def: s.m. Reminding; exhorting to obedience; remembering, praising (God).
s.m. Permission, leave, concession of liberty (to do a thing); consent of two contracting parties (as in a marriage contract)
subs: s.m. (Among Mohammadans) permission to depart given after the reading of prayers over the dead
s.m. Distribution of property by a testator, a will.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian اِذْن (izn), from Arabic إِذْن (ʔiḏn).

def: n. m. Among Mahomedans, permission to depart, given after the reading of prayers over the dead. Un se mere janāzeh pe ā yā na jāëgā, Tā pahle izn-i-ām sunāyā na jāëgā . Shāhī. He'll never near my coffin come till is pronounced The general leave for strangers to depart who pleased.
n. m. P. نامه a document. A will, a distribution of property by a testator, whether Mahomedan, or Hindū.
s.m. Name of the angel of death.
more: n. m. The angel of death.

ety: inf. n. viii of ضرب 'to beat'
def: s.m. Agitation, perturbation, restlessness, distraction, anxiety, anguish, trouble, chagrin; precipitation; flurry.
more: (inf. viii. of ضرب) s. m. Agitation, perturbation, restlessness, distraction, anguish, trouble, chagrin, precipitation.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian اِضْطِرَاب (iztirāb), from Arabic اِضْطِرَاب (iḍṭirāb, “disturbance; disorder”).

def: s.f. Agitation; hurry, impatience, precipitation.
more: s. f. Agitation, hurry, impatience, precipitation.

ety: inf. n. viii of ضرّ 'to injure'
def: Violence, compulsion, constraint; agitation, perturbation; despair, the last extremity.
more: (inf. viii. of ضرّ) s. m. Violence, compulsion, constraint; agitation, perturbation.
wety: Borrowed from Arabic اِضْطِرَار (iḍṭirār).

ety: inf. n. viii of ضرّ 'to injure'
def: Violence, compulsion, constraint; agitation, perturbation; despair, the last extremity.

ety: inf. n. of عزّ 'to be mighty, or glorious,' &c.
def: s.m. Might, greatness, grandeur, glory, dignity, majesty, excellence; — adj. Mighty, great, giorious, &c.

ety: for A. عزة, inf. n. of عزّ; see ʻizz
def: s.f. Might, power, grandeur, glory, honour, dignity, respect, esteem, reputation, good name
more: n. f. عز was high. Honor (آبرو). Apnī izzat apne hāth hai . Prov. Every man's honor is in his own hands. izzat bigāṛnā, utārnā, khonā, yā lenā, be-izzat k ., v. a. 1. See ābrū utārnā . 2. To insult; deflower; ravish; outrage. izzat banānā , v. n. To acquire rank, etc. izzat denā , v. a. See ābrū denā. izzat rakhnā , v. n. To preserve one's honor or good name. 2. To be held in public esteem. izzat k. , v. a. To render honor to; pay respect to ( ādar k .). izzat kā lāgū h., izzat ke pīchhe paṛnā , v. a. To be bent on one's disgrace. izzat meṅ baṭṭā lagnā, yā farq ānā , v. n. See ābrū meṅ baṭṭā lagnā . izzat-vālā . A respectable man; a man of rank, etc. be-izzat , adj. Disgraced ( rusvā ). be-izzatī , n. f. Loss of reputation; dishonor; defamation (عزرائيل). kauṛī yā do kauṛī kī izzat k. , v. a. To heap insults or disgrace on one. Is ne do kauṛī kī izzat kar dī .
s. f. Grandeur, power, honour, respect, glory. عزت دار iﻌzzat-dār, Powerful, honourable. عزت کرني iﻌzzat karnī, To honour, to dignify.
subs: (kisī-kī), To strip off the honour (of anyone), to dishonour, &c. ( = ʻizzat lenā)
(kisī-kī), To destroy the honour (of), to dishonour, &c. ( = ʻizzat lenā, q.v.)
adj. & s.m. Powerful, holding high rank, honourable, respectable, respected, esteemed; — a man of rank or honour, &c.; a man highly respected; a respectable man
(-ko), To confer honour or dignity (on), to do honour (to), to dignify, ennoble, exalt
(apnī), To preserve (one's) honour, or dignity, or good name; to be held in esteem
or ʻizzat-ke pīćhe paṛnā (kisī-kī), To be bent on ruining the honour or reputation (of one), to be bent on the disgrace (of)
(-kī), To render honour (to), to pay respect (to), to honour, dignify, &c.
(-kī), To deprive (one) of honour, &c., to dishonour, disgrace; to abuse, to insult; to put to shame; to destroy the reputation (of), take away the character (of); to debauch, violate, ravish
or ʻizzat-meṅ farq ānā (-kī), To have (one's) reputation or character sullied, &c.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian عِزَّت (izzat), borrowed from Arabic عِزَّة (ʕizza), from عَزَّ (ʕazza).

def: s. f. Place of worship.
Pentecost.
adj. Christian.
(inf. viii of عز Heb. and Ch. Was strong) s. m. Excellence, prevalence.
The fleeing for protection in God! may God avert!
n. prop. The angel of death.

ety: Pehl. gāś; Zend gātu; S. gātu, rt. gā
def: s.f. Place (syn. gāh)
subs: adj. & adv. In place or out of place; right or wrong; at all times indiscriminately
s.m. A necessary office, a privy (syn. pai-ḵẖāna)
s.m. A locum tenens, a deputy, a vicegerent; a successor
s.f. Sitting in the place or room (of); lieutenancy, vicegerency; succession
s.f. A carpet, mat, or cloth on which prayers are said.

def: pron. (dakh. sometimes in poetry) For جوکچهہ jo kuchh, which see under S̱. جو jo.
pron. (dakh. sometimes in poetry) For جوکوٴي jo koʼī, which see under S̱. جو jo.

ety: imperat. of jānā, q.v.
def: intj. Be off! away! avaunt!

r: jā, jo, Hindī jis, jā-su, jis-se, jā-hi, jis-ko
def: the inflected base, in Braj, of the rel. pron. jo, and = the Hindī jis; — e.g. jā-su, From whom, from which; whereby ( = jis-se); jā-hi, To whom, to whomsoever ( = jis-ko).
more: n. f. Z. jāë . (In comp.) A place; locality.
(in Braj) pron. rel. inflect. sing. Whom, what, which, any one.

s. f. A place. جا بجا jā-ba-jā, adv. Every where. جانشين jā-nishīn, s. m. A locum tenens, a deputy, a successor, a vicegerent. جانشيني jā-nishīn-ī, s. f. Sitting in the place; lieutenancy, succession.

ety: Prk. जंभा; S. जम्भः
def: s.m. A muzzle (for large cattle), ox-muzzle; a net (for fruit-trees); a kind of grass.
more: E. n. m. Muzzle for large cattle; ox-muzzle ( muṅ-chhīṅkā ).
s. m. 1. Muzzle for large cattle. 2. A net for fruit. 3. A sort of grass.

ety: Prk. जेम्वहिं or जेम्वइं loc. sing. of जेम्व = S. यावत्
def: conj. (correl. to tab), When, at the time when; as soon as; in case; since (temporal and causal)
more: adv. S. यदा When; at the time when; as soon as; in case. jab na tab , adv. 1. Never; not at all. 2. Always. jab tab , Now and then. jab tak, jab talak ; Rus. jab toṛī, jab lag, jab tāīṅ , adv. Till when; until; whilst; as long as. jab se , adv. Since. jab kabhī ; Poet. jab kabhū , adv. Whenever. jab-ki , adv. While. jab-ke , adj. Last; previous; past; of that time. jab hī , adv. 1. At the very moment or time. 2. Therefore; consequently ( jab hī to ). jab ho sake , When practicable.

adv. When, at the time when, as soon as. جب تب jab-tab, Now and then. جب تک يا تلک يا توڙي jab-tak or -talak or -toṛī, adv. Till when, whilst, as long as. جب جب jab-jab, Whenever. جب سي jab se, Since. جب کا تب jab kā tab, adv. At the time when, at the proper moment. جب کبهي jab kabhī or جب کبهو jab kabhū, Whenever. جب که jab ki, adv. At the time when, when, since. جب لگ jab-lag, adv. till when, whilst, as long as. جب نه تب jab na tab, adv. Now and then, perpetually. جبـﮩ‍ي jab-hī, adv. At the very time.
subs: jab-talak; (dialec.) jab-taʼīṅ, jab-toṛī, adv. Till when; till such time as, until; whilst, while; as long as, so long as; by that (or which) time
adj. (f. -ī), Of that time; past, previous, last
jab-kā-jab, adv. At the time when; at the proper moment
jab-kabhī, adv. When at any time, whenever
adv. & conj. At the time when, when; while; since (temp. & caus.)
adv. Now and then, at times; perpetually, always; never, not at all
adv. At the very time or moment, whenever, as soon as; — jab-hī, jab-hī-to, conj. Hence (it is, or was), on that account, therefore.
wety: From اب (ab, “now”). Cognate with Punjabi ਜਦੋਂ (jadõ) / جدوں (jadõ).

ety: for A. جعبة jaʻbat, fem.
def: s.m. A quiver (for arrows).

ety: prob. ja = jā 'born'+baddā = bhaddā, q.v.
def: adj. Stiff, rigid; awkward, clumsy; heavy.
adj. Ill-formed, ill-shaped, clumsy, ungainly, ugly, &c. = jabaddā.
v.n. To be filled; to be turned down or back; to be folded.
more: v. n. To be filled, to be folded.

def: adj. = jabaddiyā, q.v. adj. Ill-formed, ill-shaped, clumsy, ungainly, ugly, &c. = jabaddā.
adv. Everywhere; hither and thither.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian جابجا (jā-ba-jā, literally “(from) place to place”).

def: s.m. A mountain, hill.
more: s. m. A mountain, a hill.
wety: Borrowed from Arabic جَبَل (jabal).

def: s.m. An amethyst.

ety: fr. جبن
def: adj. & s.m. Cowardly, pusillanimous, timid, abject; — a coward.
s.f. Oppression, injury ( = jabr); — adj. Compelled, forced, compulsory, of force.
more: s. f. Oppression, injury. adj. Compelled, forced.

ety: from jabbār; the termination -ūt is Aramaic, and = Arabic-īyat
def: s.f. Omnipotence; the world or sphere of omnipotence; heaven; dominion.
more: s. Omnipotence, the world or sphere of omnipotence.

ety: superl. or intens. fr. جبر
def: adj. & s.m. Omnipotent, mighty; — a conqueror; a revenger; a tall palm tree; Orion.
more: (from جبر in Heb. ) 1. adj. superl. Omnipotent, mighty. 2. Conqueror. 3. s. m. A tall palm tree. 4. A revenger. 5. Orion.

def: s.f. A species of rice (grown in Rohelkhand).
adj. Right or wrong. Phr. In place or out of place; in season or out of season.

ety: Prk. जंभओ; S. जम्भ+कः
def: s.m. The jaw (cf. jabhṛā, jabṛā).

s. m. The forehead. جبـﮩ‍ه سا jabhasā, Rubbing oneʼs forehead on the ground; beseeching, begging earnestly. جبـﮩ‍ه ساٴي jabha-sā-ī, The act of rubbing the forehead on the ground, beseeching earnestly, &c.

ety: for جبہة jabhat, fem.
def: s.m. The forehead ( = jabīn)
subs: adj. Rubbing the forehead (on the ground), beseeching, begging earnestly; — jabha-sāʼī, s.f. The act of rubbing the forehead on the ground, beseeching, entreaty.

def: adv. = jab-hī, q.v.s.v. jab.
s.m. = jabṛā, q.v.

ety: Prk. जंभिआ; S. जम्भ+इका; see jāb
def: s.f. A muzzle (for small cattle).
more: s. f. Muzzle for small cattle. See جاب jāb.

def: s.f. dim. of jāb, q.v.
s.f. The forehead ( = peshānī; māthā)
more: s. f. The forehead. جبين سا jabīnsā, or جبين فرسا jabīn-farsā, Rubbing the forehead (on the ground in adoration).

= A جبرائيل jabrāʼīl, dial. vars. of jabraʼīl, q.v. the first letter of the Arabic, Persian, and Urdū alphabets. Its pronunciation depends on the vowel which accompanies it; e.g. ا with fatḥa (اَ) = the Devanāgarī अ = the English a, as in cedar (or = the English u in fun); ا with kasra (اِ) = the Devanāgarī इ = the English i, as in fin; ا with ẓamma (اُ) = the Devanāgarī उ = the English u, as in bull. — ا with fatḥa, followed by ا, (i.e. اَا, which is usually written آ) = the Devanāgarī आ = the English ā, as in father; ا with fatḥa, followed by the letter و, (i.e. اَو) = the Devanāgarī औ = the English au (sounded like ou in house); ا with fatḥa, followed by the letter ي, (i.e. اَي), = the Devanāgarī ऐ = the English ai, as in aisle. — ا with ẓamma, followed by the letter و, (i.e. اُو), = 1˚, the Devanāgarī ऊ = the English u, as in rule (or = the oo in pool), and, 2˚, = the Devanāgarī ओ = the English o, as in pole. — ا with kasra, followed by ي, (i.e. اِي), = 1˚, the Devanāgarī ई = the English ī, as in caprice; and, 2˚, = the Devanāgarī ए = the French e, as in fête. ا is used, — 1˚ (arithmetically, according to the Abjad, q.v.) for the number one. 2˚ (for अ, in Almanacks and Astrology) for Sunday, and Aries. 3˚ (for अ) as a name of the god Vishnu. 4˚ as an inseparable prefix to a word beginning with a consonant, to signify negation or privation: e.g. aśuddha, 'impure,' 'incorrect.' As in Greek, a becomes an before a vowel; e.g. ananta, 'without end,' 'endless.'
